---
title: "Infectiologie"
---

## Antibioclic {#antibioclic .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="antibioclic">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://antibioclic.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/antibioclic.png" alt="Antibioclic">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://antibioclic.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Antibioclic</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Antibioclic
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SPILF — Recommandations {#spilf .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="spilf">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.infectiologie.com/fr/recommandations.html" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/spilf.png" alt="SPILF — Recommandations">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.infectiologie.com/fr/recommandations.html" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SPILF — Recommandations</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société de Pathologie Infectieuse de Langue Française
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## Vaccination Info Service {#vaccination .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="vaccination">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://vaccination-info-service.fr/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/vaccinationinfoservice.png" alt="Vaccination Info Service">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://vaccination-info-service.fr/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">Vaccination Info Service</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Santé publique France
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
